queries.question: Show all the salaries of editors and the salaries of only those journalists who work in English.
queries.sql:
SELECT Jobs.Salary 
FROM Jobs JOIN Languages ON Jobs.LanguageProficiencyID = Languages.ID
WHERE Jobs.Title = "Editor" OR Jobs.Title = "Journalist" AND Languages.Name = "English"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?salary WHERE {
  ?jobs a :Jobs .
  ?languages a :Languages .
  ?jobs p:hasLanguages ?languages .
  ?jobs p:Salary ?salary .
  ?jobs p:Title ?title_w .
  ?jobs p:Title ?title_w2 .
  ?languages p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((STR(?title_w) = "Editor" || (STR(?title_w2) = "Journalist" && STR(?name_w) = "English")))
}

queries.question: Show editor or journalist salaries for English-language positions.
queries.sql:
SELECT Jobs.Salary  
FROM Jobs JOIN Languages ON Jobs.LanguageProficiencyID = Languages.ID
WHERE (Jobs.Title = "Editor" OR Jobs.Title = "Journalist") AND Languages.Name = "English"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?salary WHERE {
  ?jobs a :Jobs .
  ?languages a :Languages .
  ?jobs p:hasLanguages ?languages .
  ?jobs p:Salary ?salary .
  ?jobs p:Title ?title_w .
  ?jobs p:Title ?title_w2 .
  ?languages p:name ?name_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?title_w) = "Editor" || STR(?title_w2) = "Journalist")) && STR(?name_w) = "English"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display salaries for English-speaking journalists and editors.
